data.name: 女王遊戲
data.detailed_description:
在賭場中遊玩原創卡牌遊戲《Queens》！

每回合隨機發牌，按照一定規則出牌，若能完成女主角提出的所有“目標”，即可獲勝。

每位女主角都有獨特的附加規則，且每個關卡的“目標”完全不同，因此每個關卡都需要不同的策略。

享受簡單卻深奧、需要稍微提前思考的接龍樂趣吧…！

  • 卡牌遊戲

  • 技能系統：通過出牌積累MP，使用MP發動各種技能。

  • 商店：購買技能，尋找最強組合，擴展你的策略。

data.short_description: 在賭場中遊玩原創卡牌遊戲《Queens》！ 每回合隨機發牌，按照一定規則出牌，若能完成女主角提出的所有“課題”，即可獲勝。
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Queens Casino
data.detailed_description:
Enjoy playing at the casino with the original card game, "Queens"!

In each turn, cards are randomly dealt, and you play them according to specific rules. If you can clear all the "Subjectives" presented by the heroine, you win.

Each heroine comes with her own unique additional rules, and every stage features completely different "Subjectives," requiring distinct strategies for every level.

Experience a simple yet deep game that demands thinking a few steps ahead through a series of engaging choices...!

  • Card Game

  • Skill System: Activate various skills using MP, which builds up as you play cards.

  • Shop: Purchase skills, hunt for the ultimate combos, and expand your strategies.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

Recommended:

  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
